content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM and RND from autonomous agent research) can be repurposed as a sorting rule for active learning agent long-term memory, prioritizing the retention of surprising, under-learned experiences over familiar, high-frequency ones to boost 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent performance. This creates a self-sustaining memory cycle where the agent’s natural curiosity automatically curates its own memory to improve future learning.
